────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Modifiers applied: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
RemoveTimestepsBeforeEvent([(col("eval_relevant")) > (dyn float: 0)]) ±(18 rows, 1 trajectories)
'offroad_or_collision': AddCombinedEvent([([(col("collision_any")) > (dyn float: 0)]) | ([(col("offroad")) > (dyn float: 0)])]) ±(0 rows, 0 trajectories)
'collision_at_fault': AddCombinedEvent([([(col("collision_front")) > (dyn float: 0)]) | ([(col("collision_lateral")) > (dyn int: 0)])]) ±(0 rows, 0 
trajectories)
'offroad_or_collision_at_fault': AddCombinedEvent([([(col("collision_at_fault")) > (dyn float: 0)]) | ([(col("offroad")) > (dyn float: 0)])]) ±(0 rows, 0 
trajectories)
'duration_frac_20s': AddCombinedEvent([([(col("timestamps_us")) - (col("timestamps_us").min().over([col("trajectory_uid")]))]) / (dyn float: 20000000)]) ±(0 
rows, 0 trajectories)
RemoveTimestepsAfterEvent([(col("offroad_or_collision")) > (dyn float: 0)]) ±(0 rows, 0 trajectories)
RemoveTimestepsAfterEvent([(col("dist_to_gt_trajectory")) >= (dyn float: 4)]) ±(0 rows, 0 trajectories)
